title: Test HVAC Installation

items.description: HVAC System Supply and Installation (including all necessary components)
items.notes: Specific model and size to be confirmed based on site survey.

specifications: System design optimized for energy efficiency and client needs
items.notes: Includes travel time and preliminary design consultation.

specifications: Leak detection and pressure testing of refrigerant lines
Performance verification of all system components
items.notes: Ensures proper functionality and optimal performance of the installed system.

specifications: All required local permits and inspection fees
items.notes: Actual fees may vary depending on local regulations.
Covers project management, communication and administrative costs.

terms_conditions: All work shall be performed in accordance with all applicable codes and regulations.
Client is responsible for providing safe and accessible access to the work area.
Changes to the scope of work will require a written change order.
Any unforeseen conditions will be communicated promptly.
payment_terms: 30% deposit upon contract signing, 50% upon completion of installation, 20% final payment upon successful testing and commissioning.
delivery_terms: Project completion within 30 days of contract signing, subject to the availability of materials and favorable weather conditions. Specific scheduling details will be communicated in project plan.
warranty_terms: One-year parts and labor warranty on all installed components. See detailed warranty document for complete terms and conditions.
special_requirements: Client to provide access to electrical and gas services.
Client to ensure appropriate space for equipment installation.
